text:
SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: There can be multiple records per CCW_APR_LINK_KEY. If no service location exists for the provider, 
the address from the practice location is used. If no service or practice locations exist, the billing 
location is used. Therefore, the address components on this location record could be different from 
those submitted on the T-MSIS billing location record. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
